{"states":["acquired","in_stock","in_service","under_repair","returned","disposed"],"valid_transitions":{"acquired":["in_stock"],"in_stock":["in_service","disposed"],"in_service":["under_repair","returned","disposed"],"under_repair":["in_service","returned","disposed"],"returned":["in_stock","disposed"],"disposed":[]},"terminal_states":["disposed"],"notes":"disposed is immutable — no transitions out. Movement type 'dispose' triggers transition to disposed."}

{"firebase_custom_claims":{"role":"one of: inventory_staff | inventory_manager | finance_officer | system_admin | auditor","is_active":"boolean — false blocks all API access immediately (withAuth returns 403 ACCOUNT_DEACTIVATED)","cooperative_id":"string — default SAMELCO, multi-tenant guard"},"token_flow":"Browser signInWithEmailAndPassword → Firebase ID Token (RS256, 1hr) → POST /api/auth/session sets httpOnly cookie → withAuth() calls adminAuth.verifyIdToken() on every API request","rls_pattern":"withRole(userId, role, fn) sets SET LOCAL app.user_id and SET LOCAL app.user_role inside a Postgres transaction — RLS policies read via get_user_role() = current_setting('app.user_role', TRUE)","admin_panel_enforcement":["Firebase claim role=system_admin","Next.js middleware rejects non-admin on /admin/* routes","PostgreSQL RLS profiles UPDATE USING get_user_role()=system_admin"]}

{"algorithm":"HMAC-SHA256","secret_env_var":"N8N_WEBHOOK_SECRET","header":"X-IMIS-Signature","signing":"crypto.createHmac('sha256', secret).update(JSON.stringify(body)).digest('hex')","verification":"crypto.timingSafeEqual(Buffer.from(signature), Buffer.from(expected))","retry_schedule":"10s / 30s / 90s exponential backoff (3 attempts)","workflows":{"IMIS-EBS-001":"billing record creation on stock-out","IMIS-CAS-001":"COGS journal posting","IMIS-MIMS-001":"member delta sync cron every 15min","IMIS-CAS-RECONCILE":"nightly reconcile 23:00 PHT","IMIS-ALERT-DAILY":"PMS+expiry alerts 07:00 PHT","IMIS-UPIS-DEPRECIATION":"annual depreciation Jan 1 00:01 PHT"}}

{"tables":{"profiles":{"rls_type":"per-user read; system_admin write","notes":"id is Firebase UID (TEXT not UUID)"},"category_codes":{"rls_type":"all-read; system_admin write","notes":"seeded with 13 codes in 0004_seed_categories.sql"},"items":{"rls_type":"all-read; manager/admin write"},"item_attributes":{"rls_type":"all-read; manager/admin write","notes":"EAV pattern for 13-category-specific fields"},"inventory_stock":{"rls_type":"all-read; staff/manager/admin write"},"stock_movements":{"rls_type":"INSERT-ONLY — no UPDATE/DELETE ever","notes":"IMMUTABLE movement log"},"lifecycle_events":{"rls_type":"INSERT-ONLY — no UPDATE/DELETE ever","notes":"IMMUTABLE state audit trail"},"transactions":{"rls_type":"finance/admin/auditor/manager/staff read; staff/manager/admin write"},"transaction_items":{"rls_type":"same as transactions"},"pms_schedules":{"rls_type":"staff/manager/admin read; manager/admin write"},"disposal_records":{"rls_type":"manager/admin/auditor read; manager/admin write; locked after disposed"},"members":{"rls_type":"all-read; system_admin write","notes":"populated by MIMS delta sync via n8n"},"reorder_alerts":{"rls_type":"all-read; manager/admin write/resolve"},"integration_log":{"rls_type":"INSERT-ONLY — finance/admin/auditor read","notes":"IMMUTABLE external API audit trail"},"audit_log":{"rls_type":"INSERT-ONLY — admin/auditor read","notes":"IMMUTABLE user action audit trail"}},"rls_session_vars":"withRole() sets SET LOCAL app.user_id and app.user_role before every DB operation","db_driver":"drizzle-orm + postgres (node-postgres) against Railway PostgreSQL addon via DATABASE_URL"}

{"pattern":"withRole(userId, role, fn) in lib/db/with-role.ts","implementation":"db.transaction(async (tx) => { await tx.execute(sql`SET LOCAL app.user_id = ${userId}`); await tx.execute(sql`SET LOCAL app.user_role = ${role}`); return fn(tx); })","sql_functions":{"get_user_role":"SELECT current_setting('app.user_role', TRUE)","get_user_id":"SELECT current_setting('app.user_id', TRUE)"},"usage_in_api_routes":"every withAuth() handler must call withRole(decoded.uid, decoded.role, async (tx) => { ... }) for any DB operation","why":"Railway PostgreSQL is standard Postgres — no Supabase auth.jwt() extension. Session variables are the idiomatic way to pass per-request context to RLS policies in standard Postgres."}
